decisions.what: Replaced existing Python-oriented .gitignore with static-site patterns covering OS, editor, backup, and local testing files.
decisions.why: Spec 001 required a .gitignore for a pure static site and explicitly excluded Node.js/Python patterns since there are no build tools.

decisions.what: Overwrote the placeholder README.md with a full project overview, tech stack, file structure, local development steps, GitHub Pages deployment guide, browser compatibility list, and WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility notes.
decisions.why: Spec 002 required a comprehensive README covering all of these sections.
It is unrelated to OS/editor patterns but is required to keep task files out of version control in this environment.
